description_long: This object consists of three delicate, peach-colored lily flowers with prominent, elongated petals and visible stamens, accompanied by a single closed bud. The petals are slightly curved and display subtle gradients of color, with darker speckles concentrated near the center. Each flower is supported by a slender, green stem, and several narrow, lanceolate leaves emerge from the lower portions of the stems. The flowers are arranged in a loose cluster, with the open blooms facing outward and the bud positioned to one side. The overall structure is airy and natural, with the flowers appearing fresh and vibrant. The coloration and form suggest a realistic representation of lilies commonly found in urban parks or landscaped gardens.
description: A cluster of three peach-colored lily flowers with a closed bud, slender green stems, and narrow lanceolate leaves. The petals are curved and speckled, giving a lifelike and vibrant appearance.
description_view_0: Three open lily flowers and a closed bud are visible, with the flowers facing forward and slightly outward, showing the speckled inner petals and green stems.
description_view_1: The flowers are viewed from the side, with the closed bud and two open blooms aligned, highlighting the depth and layering of the petals.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the backs of the petals and stems, with the flowers facing away and the bud partially obscured.
description_view_3: A side view with the closed bud and two open flowers stacked vertically, emphasizing the slender stems and leaf arrangement.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration, with each flower displaying six overlapping petals that radiate symmetrically from the center. The petals are slightly layered, with some overlapping at the base, creating a star-like appearance typical of lilies.
